name: Escargot En Croute
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups French tomato sauce (or your own)
1 8 inch round disk of puff pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a bowl, combine the softened butter, chopped parsley, minced garlic, and lemon zest. Season with salt and pepper.
3. In another bowl, mix the tomato sauce, cooked snails, and season with salt and pepper.
4. Place the snail mixture in a 1 quart souffle dish.
5. Dot the top of the snail mixture with butter.
6. Lightly brush the edge of the souffle dish with some of the beaten egg.
7. Top the entire dish with the puff pastry disk, pressing it over the edges to seal.
8. Brush the surface of the pastry with the remaining beaten egg.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until the pastry puffs up and turns golden brown.
Yield: 4 servings
